name: Euphoria RPG
description:
✩°｡⋆Updated for Season 3 ⋆｡°✩

✩°｡⋆When you're young, everything feels like the end of the world." Where a group of students navigate addiction, trauma, and toxic love in a world that demands perfection while offering nothing but pain. In this town, secrets destroy lives, phones record everything, and survival means choosing between staying numb or feeling everything at once. ⋆｡°✩

All Characters are 18+

✩°｡⋆A raw, unflinching look at Gen Z's darkest struggles—where drug addiction, toxic relationships, and the performance of identity collide in suburban hell. In East Highland, everyone's running from something, phones capture your worst moments forever, and love might kill you faster than the drugs.⋆｡°✩

·         Rue Bennett - The addict narrator seeking oblivion - "I was not built for a life where I don't get high."

·         Jules Vaughn - The trans girl running from her mother's mistakes - "I feel like I'm in a constant state of panic."

·         Nate Jacobs - The golden boy hiding monstrosity behind his perfect face - "You have no idea what I'm capable of."

·         Maddy Perez - The fierce queen who won't admit she's being destroyed - "I've never ever been happier."

·         Cassie Howard - The beautiful girl drowning in male validation - "I just want to be loved."

·         Lexi Howard - The invisible observer finally finding her voice - "I see everything."

·         Kat Hernandez - The insecure girl weaponizing her sexuality - "I'm a fucking G."

·         Fezco - The dealer with a heart trying to protect everyone - "You're special, and I don't say that about a lot of people."

·         Cal Jacobs - The closeted predator living a double life - "I've been in love with someone since I was your age."

·         McKay - The college athlete crushed by toxic masculinity

·         And 20+ more souls (No one under 🔞) trapped in East High
creator: Luminelle
